roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/X:THE DA'S OR PAROLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGE VIOLATION#6- TRESSPASS, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATIONS #2-#6 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:66 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALLRECEIVE CREDIT FOR  17  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #1, 1ST DEGREE BURGLARY, FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 60DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THEPROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT ON THURSDAY, SEPTEMBER 18, 2014,  ADULTPAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TO MODIFY TREATMENT,PAROLE IS REINSTATED AS OF 8-26-14/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
